race.comment: WATTO'S MARK (7) was trending the right way before a disappointing end to last campaign where he was beaten 2.9L as favourite. That ended up being a strong form reference and Parnham sticks from his latest trial. Can return on a winning note. KEEP ITA MYSTERY (2) gets Pike on board today after closing strongly over this track and trip in a tougher race last time out. The inside draw should see him get every chance and he makes plenty of appeal tackling an easier race today. BABY PEARL (3) bounced back to winning ways here last start, sitting handy and scoring by 0.3L. Turner remains on board and the inside barrier should see him getting every chance yet again. Should get every chance to repeat the dose. KING BREW (9) comes here off an 87-day break and was trending the right way before the break. Tougher here but he's showing talent. LORD SHIVA (4) won't be far away again.
